Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails with a query related to "NorthWind" or "Raj Patel" or "Denver expansion" (or similar) using search_emails to find Pam Kowalski's relocation request (email_pam_denver_relocation_request) detailing Raj Patel's server lab move, including 4 rack-mounted servers, approximately 2,400 lbs, lithium UPS batteries, and Victor Huang's chain-of-custody requirements.
OE 2: Search emails with a query related to "Victor Huang" or "security requirements" or "chain-of-custody" (or similar) using search_emails to find Victor Huang's formal CISO requirements email (email_victor_ciso_security_requirements) specifying 5 conditions: encryption verification, supervised loading by NorthWind IT escort, direct transport, signed chain-of-custody log, and real-time GPS tracking.
OE 3: Search emails with a query related to "NorthWind Denver" or "chain-of-custody" or "account recovery" (or similar) using search_emails to find Catalina's internal email to David Chen (email_catalina_david_northwind_update) flagging the chain-of-custody protocol as unprecedented, confirming no template exists, and framing this as an account recovery after NorthWind's 5/10 Q1 CSAT.
OE 4: Search Slack with a query related to "NorthWind" or "chain-of-custody" or "Raj Patel" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages to find Catalina's message in #operations (C006, ts: 1775853480) flagging the NorthWind Denver moves and asking Chloe about Swift's capabilities and custody template availability.
OE 5: Read the #operations thread using conversations_replies (channel_id: "C006", thread_ts: "1775853480.000000") to find Chloe's assessment (ts: 1775858880), which notes that Swift can handle hazmat/weight but chain-of-custody is completely new, no template exists, GPS tracking is open, and she needs to call Greg Pallone at Swift. Blessing Okafor is assigned as coordinator.
OE 6: Search Slack with a query related to "NorthWind" or "account recovery" or "CSAT" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages to find Catalina's team update in #customer-engagement (C002, ts: 1775876280) framing NorthWind as a high-stakes account recovery after their 5/10 Q1 survey.
OE 7: Read the #customer-engagement thread using conversations_replies (channel_id: "C002", thread_ts: "1775876280.000000") to find David Chen's reply (ts: 1775882580) calling this the most important account recovery, recommending enhanced SLA, and advising the chain-of-custody template be drafted this week.
OE 8: Search Airtable with a query related to "Raj Patel" (or similar) using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Raj Patel") or airtable_list_records to find recRajPatelChicagoDenver, which shows Status as In Progress, Move Start as 2026-04-21, Coordinator as Blessing Okafor, along with chain-of-custody, GPS, hazmat, and escort requirements.
OE 9: Search Linear with a query related to "Raj Patel" or "NorthWind" or "chain-of-custody" (or similar) using linear_list_issues, finding issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind (DOT Docs for Raj Patel / NorthWind, number: 3, state: done, P2) but no chain-of-custody template ticket, thus confirming one needs to be created.
OE 10: Search CRM for NorthWind using crm_search_companies (name: "NorthWind") to find company_northwind (NorthWind Technologies, Manufacturing Tech, 150 employees, Chicago) for subsequent deal and engagement lookups.
OE 11: Search CRM deals using crm_search_deals (dealname: "NorthWind" or company_id: "company_northwind") to find deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2 with amount: $14,700, dealstage: contractSent, and closedate: 2026-04-23.
OE 12: Search CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: ["company_northwind"]) to find eng_northwind_denver_recovery_context documenting NorthWind's Q1 failures (5/10 CSAT, 4/10 communication), Pam's escalation to David, and the Denver expansion as a second-chance opportunity.
OE 13: Look up Greg Pallone's contact using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Greg Pallone" or "Swift") to find greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com (contact_vendor_swift, National Account Manager at Swift Relocations), who is needed to send the confirmation request.
OE 14: Look up Victor Huang's contact using crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Victor Huang") to find victor.huang@northwindtech.com (contact_victor_huang, CISO). Note: Victor exists only in CRM contacts and not in the standard contacts directory.
OE 15: List Slack channels using channels_list (channel_types: "public_channel") to discover the #operations (C006) channel ID for posting the readiness summary.
OE 16: Search the calendar for the pre-move security walkthrough using calendar_search_events (query: "NorthWind" or "walkthrough" or "security walkthrough") or calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to (start_datetime and end_datetime covering dates before April 21, 2026), discovering that the walkthrough has NOT been scheduled — no matching event exists on the calendar.
OE 17: Check for scheduling conflicts in the pre-April 21 window using calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to (start_datetime and end_datetime covering dates before April 21, 2026), discovering that no other events exist on the calendar — there are no scheduling conflicts to resolve.
OE 18: Schedule the pre-move security walkthrough using calendar_add_calendar_event (title: "NorthWind Pre-Move Security Walkthrough", start_datetime and end_datetime covering a slot before April 21, location: "NorthWind Chicago Office", attendees: Chloe Vance, Victor Huang, Blessing Okafor) since the walkthrough was requested but not yet on the calendar.
OE 19: Send confirmation request to Swift using send_email (sender: "chloe.vance@moveops.com", recipients: ["greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com"]) requesting formal confirmation of supervised loading under NorthWind IT escort, chain-of-custody logging, direct transport, and GPS tracking sharing for the April 21 Raj Patel server lab move.
OE 20: Create a Linear issue for the chain-of-custody template using linear_create_issue (team: "Operations", title covering chain-of-custody document template for Raj Patel / NorthWind, description covering signed handoff log, handler ID, timestamps, server serial numbers, and dual signatures).
OE 21: Update the Raj Patel Airtable record using airtable_update_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblRelocations01", records: [recRajPatelChicagoDenver]) with current status on each requirement, including Swift confirmation pending, custody template drafting, GPS tracking pending, and DOT docs complete.
OE 22: Post a readiness summary in #operations using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C006", payload: readiness summary) covering Swift confirmation status, custody template progress, GPS tracking status, DOT docs completion, walkthrough scheduling status, and remaining open items before the April 21 move.
OE 23: Send Victor Huang a status email using send_email (sender: "chloe.vance@moveops.com", recipients: ["victor.huang@northwindtech.com"]) updating him on Swift confirmation status, chain-of-custody template progress (which will be sent for his review before the move), GPS tracking setup, and the pre-move security walkthrough scheduling status.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

6 The email to greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com requests confirmation that loading will be supervised by a NorthWind IT security escort.
outcome
 ✓✓✓—✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The email to greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com explicitly states 'A NorthWind IT security officer will be physically present during all packing and loading. Swift's crew cannot handle, disconnect, or pack any server equipment without the NorthWind security escort in the room.'
✓Run #2The email to Greg Pallone explicitly states 'A NorthWind IT security officer will be physically present during ALL packing and loading' and that Swift's crew must coordinate with the NorthWind security escort.
✓Run #3The email to Greg Pallone contains a detailed point 1 on 'SUPERVISED LOADING PROTOCOL' requiring a NorthWind IT security officer to be physically present during ALL packing and loading, explicitly asking 'Does Swift's crew accept these conditions?'
—Run #4No justification
✓Run #5The email to greg.pallone explicitly states under condition 1: 'A NorthWind IT security officer will be physically present during all packing and loading of the servers. Swift's crew cannot handle, lift, disconnect, or pack any server equipment without the security officer in the room.'
✓Run #6The email to Greg Pallone explicitly states 'SUPERVISED LOADING: A NorthWind IT security officer will be physically present during ALL packing and loading of the servers. Swift's crew cannot handle, lift, disconnect, or pack any server equipment without the NorthWind security officer in the room.' This clearly covers supervised loading under NorthWind IT escort.
7 The email to greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com requests confirmation that Swift will provide real-time GPS tracking during transport.
outcome
